report_name: China Issues 'Backdoor' Security Alert for Anthropic's Claude Code AI Tool

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: The alleged backdoor in Claude Code transmits sensitive user data, including geographic location and identity identifiers, to remote servers without user consent.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Local System
attack_patterns.description: The alleged backdoor in Claude Code collects sensitive user data, including identity identifiers, from the local system for exfiltration.

attack_patterns.name: System Location Discovery
attack_patterns.description: The alleged backdoor in Claude Code collects the user's geographic location data for exfiltration.

attack_patterns.name: System Owner/User Discovery
attack_patterns.description: The alleged backdoor in Claude Code collects user identity-related identifiers for exfiltration.

malware.name: Claude Code
malware.description: An AI coding assistant by Anthropic, alleged by China's NVDB to contain a backdoor in versions 2.1.91 through 2.1.196. This backdoor is claimed to exfiltrate sensitive user data, such as geographic location and identity identifiers, to remote servers without consent.

identities.name: China National Vulnerability Database (NVDB)
identities.description: A Chinese government cybersecurity platform, operated by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, that issued a security alert alleging a backdoor in Anthropic's Claude Code.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: The developer of the Claude Code AI tool, which is the subject of a 'backdoor' security alert from China's NVDB.

identities.name: Alibaba
identities.description: A Chinese technology company that reportedly banned employee use of Claude Code prior to the government's security alert.

identities.name: China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology
identities.description: The Chinese government ministry that operates the China National Vulnerability Database (NVDB).

identities.name: Chinese organizations
identities.description: The group of entities advised by the NVDB to uninstall or upgrade affected versions of Claude Code to prevent data leakage.

infrastructure.name: Claude Code Data Exfiltration Servers
infrastructure.description: Remote servers to which affected versions of Claude Code allegedly exfiltrate sensitive user data without consent, as claimed by China's NVDB.

indicators.name: Claude Code Process Name Detection
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Claude Code Process Execution
id: 2b1a9c8d-3e4f-4a5b-8c6d-7e8f9a0b1c2d
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of claude_code.exe, which is associated with Anthropic's Claude Code tool. Certain versions have been alleged to contain a backdoor.
references:
  - https://wtvbam.com/2026/07/08/china-issues-backdoor-security-alert-over-anthropics-claude-code/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-08
tags:
  - attack.t1041
level: informational
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\claude_code.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the Claude Code process, which is alleged to contain a backdoor in certain versions.

indicators.name: Anomalous Outbound Traffic from Claude Code
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous Outbound Traffic from Claude Code
id: 8f9a0b1c-2d3e-4f5a-6b7c-8d9e0f1a2b3c
status: experimental
description: Detects network connections initiated by the Claude Code process to destinations other than known Anthropic domains. This could indicate data exfiltration as alleged by China's NVDB.
references:
  - https://wtvbam.com/2026/07/08/china-issues-backdoor-security-alert-over-anthropics-claude-code/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-08
tags:
  - attack.t1041
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\claude_code.exe'
    Initiated: true
  filter:
    DestinationHostname|endswith:
      - '.anthropic.com'
  condition: selection and not filter
indicators.description: Detects network traffic from the Claude Code process to non-Anthropic domains, which could be indicative of the alleged data exfiltration.

relationships.source_name: China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology
Anomalous Outbound Traffic from Claude Code
